articles.title: Minecraft Adds The Ability To Sit 17 Years Later And It’s Reinventing Everything
articles.summary: Minecraft's introduction of cushions as a decoration has revolutionized the game by allowing players to sit for the first time in its history, and this feature is now being used to reinvent various aspects of the game. Cushions behave differently due to their classification as entities rather than blocks, enabling them to escape Minecraft's grid and create unique designs such as roof tiles made using cushions. This has led to new furniture options and travel methods that can teleport players, including the ability to line up cushions for faster elevators. The introduction of cushions is a significant development in Minecraft, offering players more creative freedom and possibilities for building and exploration.
